story.text:
# Axis · connection

**network** · zk-dimension *connection*

Lattice basis vertex **4** (bit 2) — see [[Axioms]] A1.
One of the six roots; it grows a heptad of seven stations that fold into the territory.

## The heptad (fill order → keystone last)

| # | station | role | class | persona |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | head | lead advisor | vision fish | 📯 Herald |
| 2 | head-heart | visionary advisor | vision fish | 🕸️ Netkeeper |
| 3 | head-hands | strategist maker | vision fish | 🪞 Mirrorkeeper |
| 4 | hands | lead builder | mouse | 🌲 Ranger |
| 5 | heart-hands | caring builder | mouse | 🎯 Archer |
| 6 | heart | steward builder | mouse | 🕯️ Priest |
| 7 | head-heart-hands | keystone guide | privacy guide | 🤝 Ceremonist |
See the whole roster: [[Personas]] · the stations: [[Stations]]

---
[[Welcome]] · the Game of 42 — six axes × seven stations = 42
